The device they'll actually put down

Smartphones are designed to steal attention. Karri was made to keep kids in the moment. A simple, screen-free voice messenger with GPS tracking that keeps you connected to them, and them to their friends.

Order Messenger 1Order Messenger 2

  • Messenger to app chats

    Send quick voice notes between your phone and their Karri Messenger, and bring trusted adults into the loop for private family chats.

  • GPS locator

    GPS location lets you check their exact spot and device battery life, so you can relax knowing they are safe.

  • Messenger to Messenger chats

    Give them the independence to safely message their mates that you approve, making it the perfect safe space for kids to be kids.
See how they work

Loved by parents

Developed with kids

Easy to use

Push, Speak and Go!

No need for screens. Karri uses simple physical buttons so staying in touch is easy. It takes seconds to send a message, keeping their heads up taking in the real world.

A little peace of mind

The Karri app keeps you in the loop. Send quick voice notes and check their location without interrupting their play.

  • Setup private one-on-one or friends and family group chats
  • Pin point their exact location whenever you need a quick sanity check
  • Create virtual safe areas
  • Get instant SOS notifications if they ever need help fast
  • Available on iOS & Android
Pre-order now

What parents say

"As a parent I think the Karri is a great product as it gives my daughter a way to send me a message without being glued or distracted by a screen. Plus I can check where she is if I need to. Bella loves her Karri as it makes it easy for her to send a quick message when she is out and about with her friends. Would definitely recommend!"

Sophie, mum of Bella (8)

“We wanted to be able to give our son more independence without getting him a phone. The Karri works brilliantly… Our son gets his independence and we get our peace of mind. It’s win-win!”

Sarah, mum of Edward (10)

“Karri has been a game-changer for us. Milo suffers with separation anxiety… We’ve seen a real step change in his confidence since he’s had the Karri.”

Alison, mum of Milo (9)

Since changing my job, my commute is longer, so I had to start giving my kids a key in case I cannot pick them up on time. While the school is not far away I was always so worried and my daughter did not feel comfortable being at home alone with no way of contacting me. KARRI has been amazing - I can see they got home ok after school and let them know I will be back soon! Strongly recommend!

Dina, mum of Elly and Leon (7 and 8 years old)

Designed for fun, built for reliability

We designed Karri to make sure it is fun to use for kids but reliable when it comes to connection.

  • Data-enabled with built in SIM card for perfect connection
  • GPS tracking for peace of mind
  • Hard cover casing
  • Battery life of up to 72 hours
  • Works worldwide depending on membership
Order Now

Frequently Asked Questions

Does Karri work abroad?

Karri currently works worldwide, depending on your membership plan.

How much does it cost?

You pay one time to buy a Karri messenger and sign up for a monthly or annual subscription to use it. The subscription can be cancelled any time - no minimum contract length. We also offer discounts if you buy and use more than one KARRI. You can find more detailed info here:

Membership plans

Is the SIM card included?

Yes - each Karri comes with a built-in SIM card, so you don't need to buy anything extra. You simply buy a messenger and sign up for a monthly or annual plan which you can also cancel whenever you want to.

How far does it reach?

As Karri is data-enabled it literally works like a phone in terms of connection. It works on all networks including 2G, 3G, 4G and LTE and will always pick the network with the strongest signal. This way we can guarantee a 99% population coverage.

Who can contact my child?

Simply put - no-one apart from you and whoever you add as a trusted contact. Our SIM cards do not have phone numbers meaning that no one can send messages to a Karri unless you have previously added and approved the contact via the parental app.

Stay informed about Karri launches and new shipments

...and receive a 20% discount code off your first order.

Reliable connection

Karri offers 99% population coverage and 75% geographic coverage.

The data-enabled, integrated SIM card simply chooses the best available network in the area (3G, 4G and LTE) and connects to it automatically.

Is your school or class thinking about going smartphone free?
